title: Foldable Tourist Brochure Design

You’ll shape them into a smart foldable layout that prints cleanly and reads effortlessly in hand. Clean typography, high-resolution imagery and a logical information flow are essential. Feel free to suggest paper size or folding style beyond the classic tri-fold if it serves the design better. When you respond, link to past work that proves you can handle tourist-focused print pieces or similarly persuasive collateral. No formal proposal needed—your portfolio should speak for itself. title: High School Educational Presentation Design
desc: I need a polished educational slide-deck created specifically for high-school students. The topic itself will be shared once we begin, but expect material that should feel current, visually engaging and easy for teenagers to digest in one class period. What I’m after: • Around 8 slides that break the subject down into clear, digestible sections. • Consistent, modern styling with graphics, icons or short video snippets where appropriate to hold their attention. • Brief speaker notes under each slide so any teacher can pick it up and teach confidently. You’re free to build in PowerPoint, Google Slides or Keynote—whichever lets you achieve crisp visuals and smooth animations. Please keep text concise, use high-contrast colours for readability, and cite any images or data you include. Once we’re happy with the overall flow I’ll request one revision pass for tweaks. Deliver the final deck plus an editable source file so future updates are easy.

title: Hockey Highlight Reel Creator

What I’ll supply • Raw video files (HD) plus a rough list of event markers. • Team logos, lower-third templates, and any branded assets you’ll need. What I expect back • One master file in 1080p (MP4 or MOV) and web-ready snippets for social media (≤60 seconds). • A brief write-up (150-200 words) summarizing the game’s turning points, suitable for posting alongside the video. • Delivery of the first completed reel within a month from project start, with room for one revision round. Preferred tools include Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve—use whichever you’re most efficient in. title: Photo Crop & Background Removal
desc: I have a set of photos that need quick but precise attention. The job is limited to two edits on each file: tidy cropping/resizing to the dimensions I’ll supply and clean background removal so the final images sit on pure transparency. No colour work or creative retouching is required—just accurate cuts and a flawless knockout. Please deliver each photo back in PNG (transparent) and the original resolution JPG for archive. If you prefer Adobe Photoshop, Affinity, or a comparable editor, that’s fine by me; consistency across all images is what matters. Acceptance criteria • Precise crop matches the pixel dimensions I provide • Background fully removed with no halos or artefacts at 100 % zoom • Files returned in both PNG (transparent) and source-size JPG Let me know how many images you can handle in 24 hours and I’ll send them straight over.

title: Advanced Premiere Pro Video Editing
desc: **Title:** Cinematic Travel Video Editor Needed (Premiere Pro Template for Iceland Tourist Business) I’m starting a new cinematic tourist video business in Iceland and I’m looking for a highly creative video editor to create: * One 30-second YouTube Shorts template * One 90-second cinematic travel video template Both videos must be built in **Adobe Premiere Pro** and designed so I can easily replace footage for future clients. ### Style I want the videos to feel: * Very cinematic * Trendy and modern * Emotional and fun * Fast paced with clean storytelling * Similar to high-end travel videos on YouTube/Instagram/TikTok The edits MUST cut perfectly on the beat of the music. Song reference: “Petit Biscuit - I Leave Again ft. Shallou” ### Important Editing Features I want creative transitions and cinematic effects such as: * Speed ramping / time warping * Slow motion moments * Hand-to-camera transitions * Pull-outs into different scenes * Dynamic aerial shots * Seamless travel-style transitions * Cinematic sound design * Strong storytelling flow ### Deliverables #### 30 Second Version Need 3 separate versions: 1. Sunny blue sky day 2. Cloudy day 3. Rainy / moody day #### 90 Second Version Also need: 1. Sunny version 2. Cloudy version 3. Rainy version ### Iceland Locations / Theme The

title: Architectural Thesis Panel Design
desc: Architectural Thesis Presentation Panels Designer Required I am looking for a designer with experience in architectural presentations and Photoshop panel design to create 3 professional thesis presentation panels. Scope of Work The work mainly involves organizing, visualizing, and presenting thesis content in a professional and visually appealing manner. Content to be presented includes: Research & Literature Review Case Studies Site Analysis Design Methodology Concept Development Zoning Design Response Infographics and Visual Representation of Data Deliverables 3 professionally designed Photoshop panels Creative layouts and compositions High-quality maps, diagrams, and infographics Editable PSD files Important Notes Additional project information and content will be provided after the project is awarded. Experience with architectural thesis, academic presentations, or architectural portfolios is preferred. Timeline Delivery required within 3–4 days after project award. Please share relevant samples of previous architectural presentation panel work along with your proposal.

title: Best Social Media Brand Identity Designer On The Planet.
desc: Were looking for a top-tier Instagram designer to create premium social media posts for our real estate acquisitions brand. We are not looking for basic Canva templates or generic real estate content. We want someone with taste, creativity, strong design instincts, and the ability to think independently. You will be responsible for creating Instagram posts from start to finish, including: -Post concepts -Design -Captions -Hashtags -Carousel layouts -Brand-consistent visuals Our style is clean, sharp, premium, modern, and authoritative. Think institutional real estate firm, not local realtor page. We acquires $120M+ in real estate annually, and our content needs to reflect that level of credibility and execution. We want someone who can take our company, deals, insights, and brand vision — and turn them into high-quality Instagram content that feels NOBU standard. Ideal candidate: Strong Instagram/social media design portfolio Excellent taste in typography, layout, and branding Able to write clean captions and relevant hashtags Creative enough to bring post ideas without being micromanaged Experience with real estate, finance, luxury, or corporate brands is a plus Fast, reliable, and detail-oriented To apply, send your portfolio, examples of Instagram work, your rate, and a short

title: Birthday Poster Design Using Canva
desc: I need a freelancer to design a birthday poster using Canva or other similar tool. A3 landscape, 300 DPI, PDF print-ready with bleed I will share a screen shot of a mockup as the design reference - tweaks and changes may be made All content and text ready to paste Estimated time: 1 hour for someone who has done this before Needed by Monday evening at the latest to print Tuesday The task is short-term and requires entry-level proficiency in graphic design.

title: Boutique Brand Identity / Guidelines Designer
desc: We are looking for an experienced brand designer to help refine and finalize a boutique high-end residential estate management brand identity for a new business called Dimora Estates. This is not a full branding project from scratch. We already have a strong strategic and visual foundation in place and are looking for someone with refined design sensibility to help sharpen, organize, and finalize the identity into a polished boutique brand guidelines deck. About the Brand: Dimora Estates is a boutique estate operations & oversight firm focused on helping affluent homeowners oversee and protect high-value residential properties through preventative oversight, operational coordination, vendor management, and structured estate support. The brand direction is: Architectural Refined Intentional Trustworthy Understated High-end residential Editorial and timeless Operationally sophisticated We already have: Logo / icon Positioning statement Brand personality Voice & tone Color palette Typography system - may need additional word Clear market positioning We mainly need help: refining and validating the existing direction tightening hierarchy and consistency imagery / photography direction example applications and usage organizing everything into a concise, cohesive brand identity deck De
